properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Once from my poor sin sick soul Christ did every burden roll Now I walk redeemed and whole Hand in hand with Jesus.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hand in hand we walk each day Hand in hand along the way Walking thus I cannot stray Hand in hand with Jesus.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the stars are backward rolled And His face I shall behold I will tread the streets of gold Hand in hand with Jesus.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In this world I meet with trials And sometimes I feel distressed I feel Christ who holds my hands And he gives me comfort
